effect.skill_tree_rpgs.frost_vulnerabili: Increased damage taken from frost critical strikes.
item.skill_tree_rpgs.orb_of_oblivion.lor: Reset all skill points spend on the Class Skill Tree.

spell.skill_tree_rpgs.arcane_tier_1_pass: Arcane spell impacts have {trigger_chance} chance, to cause a small explosion, dealing {damage} damage.
Arcane spell impacts have {trigger_chance} chance, to heal the you for {heal}.
spell.skill_tree_rpgs.arcane_tier_2_pass: Upon rolling, you leave behind an Arcane Trap, lasting {cloud_duration} sec, dealing {damage} damage to entering enemies.
Upon rolling, you become invulnerable for {effect_duration} sec.
spell.skill_tree_rpgs.arcane_tier_2_spel: Arcane Missile shoots {extra_launch} additional missile per batch.
Arcane Missiles apply slowness, reducing movement speed by {bonus}, stacking up to {effect_amplifier_cap} times, lasting {effect_duration} sec.
spell.skill_tree_rpgs.arcane_tier_3_pass: Upon taking damage, an Arcane Bolt is launched at the attacker, dealing {damage} damage.
Arcane spells have {trigger_chance} chance, to grant you Arcane Ward, absorbing high amount of damage, lasting {effect_duration} sec.
spell.skill_tree_rpgs.arcane_tier_3_spel: Arcane Beam applies Arcane Exposure increasing Arcane damage taken by {bonus}, stacking up to {effect_amplifier_cap} times, lasting {effect_duration} sec.
Arcane Beam hits increase your speed and jump strength by {bonus} for {effect_duration} sec, stacking up to {effect_amplifier_cap} times.
spell.skill_tree_rpgs.arcane_tier_4_spel: Blink turns your next spell cast instant, within the next {stash_duration} sec.
Blink attempts to remove 2 negative effects from you entirely.
spell.skill_tree_rpgs.archer_tier_1_pass: Hitting Marked target increasing ranged attack speed by {bonus}, stacking up to {effect_amplifier_cap} times, lasting {effect_duration} sec.
Arrows have {trigger_chance} chance, to stun the target for {effect_duration} sec.
spell.skill_tree_rpgs.archer_tier_2_pass: Rolling grants you an additional stack of Rhythm.
Rolling has {trigger_chance} chance to increase your roll recharge speed by {bonus}, for {effect_duration} sec.
spell.skill_tree_rpgs.archer_tier_2_spel: Power Shot applies {stash_amplifier_add} additional Hunter's Mark stack.
Entangling Roots has {impact_chance} chance to immobilize the target for {effect_duration} sec.
spell.skill_tree_rpgs.archer_tier_3_pass: Arrow hits have {trigger_chance_1} chance to Supercharge your next shot within {stash_duration} sec, taking longer to pull but dealing {bonus} damage with strong knockback.
Upon taking damage below {threshold} health you gain Deflection effect, parrying the next {effect_amplifier} incoming melee attack, lasting {effect_duration} sec.
spell.skill_tree_rpgs.archer_tier_3_spel: Barrage arrow hits heal you by {heal}.
spell.skill_tree_rpgs.archer_tier_4_spel: Magic Arrow has {trigger_chance} chance to reset its own cooldown.
spell.skill_tree_rpgs.fire_tier_1_passiv: Fire spell impacts have {trigger_chance} chance to apply Fire Vulnerability. Increasing damage taken from fire spells by {bonus}, stacking up to {effect_amplifier_cap} times, lasting {effect_duration} sec.
Fire spell impacts have {trigger_chance} chance to stun the target for {effect_duration} sec.
spell.skill_tree_rpgs.fire_tier_2_passiv: Upon rolling, you leave behind a Flame Trap, lasting {cloud_duration} sec, dealing {damage} damage and applying Fire Vulnerability to entering enemies.
Upon rolling, you have {trigger_chance} chance to gain {bonus} movement speed for {effect_duration} sec.
spell.skill_tree_rpgs.fire_tier_2_spell_: Fire Breath hits have {trigger_chance} chance to explode a target, dealing {damage} damage to nearby enemies.
Increased the range of Fire Breath by {range_add}.
spell.skill_tree_rpgs.fire_tier_3_passiv: Taking damage has {trigger_chance} chance to cause a strong explosion, dealing {damage} damage to nearby enemies.
Fire spells have {trigger_chance_1} chance, to grant you Flame Ward, absorbing damage and dealing {damage} damage to attackers, lasts {stash_duration} sec.
spell.skill_tree_rpgs.fire_tier_3_spell_: Meteor impacts leave a fiery area behind, lasting {cloud_duration} sec.
spell.skill_tree_rpgs.fire_tier_4_spell_: Wall of Flames spawns 2 additional columns.
Wall of Flames heals you and allies for {heal}.
spell.skill_tree_rpgs.frost_tier_1_passi: Frost spell impacts have {trigger_chance} chance to apply Winter's Chill effect. Increasing damage taken from frost spell critical strikes by {bonus}, stacking up to {effect_amplifier_cap} times, lasting {effect_duration} sec.
Frost spell impacts have {trigger_chance} chance, to freeze the target for {effect_duration} sec.
spell.skill_tree_rpgs.frost_tier_2_passi: Upon rolling, you leave behind a Frost Trap, lasting {cloud_duration} sec, applying Freeze effect to entering enemies.
Upon rolling, you have {trigger_chance_1} chance to instantly cast a spell, within the next {stash_duration} sec.
spell.skill_tree_rpgs.frost_tier_2_spell: Frost Nova causes secondary explosions, dealing {damage} damage to nearby enemies.
Frost Nova applies {effect_amplifier_add} more stack of Freeze effect.
spell.skill_tree_rpgs.frost_tier_3_passi: Taking damage has {trigger_chance} chance to reset cooldowns of Frost spells.
Frost spells have {trigger_chance_1} chance, to grant you Frost Ward, absorbing damage and slowing attackers, lasts {stash_duration} sec.
spell.skill_tree_rpgs.frost_tier_3_spell: Allows normal movement speed during the effect of Frost Shield.
Increases the duration of Frost Shield by {effect_duration_add} sec.
spell.skill_tree_rpgs.frost_tier_4_spell: Blizzard applies Slowness for {effect_duration} sec, stacking up to {effect_amplifier_cap} times.
spell.skill_tree_rpgs.paladin_tier_1_pas: Melee attacks have {trigger_chance_1} chance, to deal additional {damage} damage based on Healing Power.
Blocking with shield grants {bonus} armor, stacking up to {effect_amplifier_cap} times, lasting {effect_duration} sec.
spell.skill_tree_rpgs.paladin_tier_2_pas: Upon rolling, you have {trigger_chance_1} chance for your next melee attack to apply Crusader's Mark, increasing damage taken by {bonus}, for {effect_duration} sec.
Upon rolling, you have {trigger_chance} chance to reset the cooldown of Divine Protection.
spell.skill_tree_rpgs.paladin_tier_2_spe: Flash Heal attempts to cure the target, by reducing the strength of a harmful effect.
Divine Protection provides {effect_amplifier_add} extra effect stack.
spell.skill_tree_rpgs.paladin_tier_3_pas: Melee attacks throw a hammer at the target, dealing {damage} damage, ricocheting {ricochet} to nearby enemies.
Upon taking damage below {threshold} health, your max health is increased by {bonus}, for {effect_duration} sec.
spell.skill_tree_rpgs.paladin_tier_3_spe: Increases the damage of Judgement by {power_multiplier}.
Judgement taunts enemies hit, forcing them to attack you.
spell.skill_tree_rpgs.paladin_tier_4_spe: Increases the duration of Battle Banner by {spawn_duration_add} sec.
Battle Banner also reduces damage taken by {bonus}.
spell.skill_tree_rpgs.priest_tier_1_pass: Healing spells apply Healing Focus effect. Increasing healing received by {bonus}, stacking up to {effect_amplifier_cap} times, lasting {effect_duration} sec.
Spell hits have {trigger_chance} chance to increase spell haste by {bonus}, stacking up to {effect_amplifier_cap} times, lasting {effect_duration} sec.
spell.skill_tree_rpgs.priest_tier_2_pass: Upon rolling, nearby mobs stop attacking you, allowing them to target your allies.
Upon rolling, you have {trigger_chance_1} chance to guarantee critical strike for your next spell cast.
spell.skill_tree_rpgs.priest_tier_2_spel: Reduces the cooldown of Holy Light by {cooldown_duration_deduct} sec.
Holy Light deals {power_multiplier} more damage, and lights enemies on fire.
spell.skill_tree_rpgs.priest_tier_3_pass: Healing targets under {threshold} health, grants them Pain Suppression, reducing damage taken by {bonus}, for {effect_duration} sec.
Spell critical strikes and heals grant you {stash_amplifier} Celestial Orbs. Orbs damage enemies attacking you, dealing {damage} spell damage.
spell.skill_tree_rpgs.priest_tier_3_spel: Circle of Healing removes {effect_amplifier} negative effect from allies.
Circle of Healing leaves a consecrated area behind, dealing {damage} damage to enemies, for {cloud_duration} sec.
spell.skill_tree_rpgs.priest_tier_4_spel: Reduces the cooldown of Barrier by {cooldown_duration_deduct} sec.
Increases the duration of Barrier by {spawn_duration_add} sec.
spell.skill_tree_rpgs.rogue_tier_1_passi: Melee attacks have {trigger_chance_1} chance, to apply poison effect lasting {effect_duration} sec, stacking up based on your attack damage.
Melee attacks have {trigger_chance_1} chance to wound the enemy, dealing {damage} damage and reducing its armor by {bonus}, for {effect_duration} sec.
spell.skill_tree_rpgs.rogue_tier_2_passi: Upon rolling, you gain a stack of Sidestep, increasing your Evasion Chance by {bonus}, stacking up to {stash_amplifier} times. Removed when taking damage.
Upon rolling, you have {trigger_chance_1} chance for your next melee attack to heal you by {heal}.
spell.skill_tree_rpgs.rogue_tier_2_spell: Increases the maximum number of Slice and Dice stacks by {effect_amplifier_cap_add}.
Shock Powder has {trigger_chance} chance to create secondary explosions, dealing {damage} damage.
spell.skill_tree_rpgs.rogue_tier_3_passi: When taking damage that would be fatal, you become invulnerable for {effect_duration} sec.
Upon evading an attack, you have {trigger_chance} chance for all your cooldowns to reset.
spell.skill_tree_rpgs.rogue_tier_3_spell: Shadowstep grants you Cloak of Shadows effect, protecting your from {effect_amplifier} incoming attack for {effect_duration} sec.
Next attack after Shadowstep, within {effect_duration} sec, deals {bonus} extra damage.
spell.skill_tree_rpgs.rogue_tier_4_spell: Stealth no longer slows you down.
Increases the duration of Stealth by {effect_duration_add} sec.
spell.skill_tree_rpgs.warrior_tier_1_pas: Killing an enemy increases Attack Damage by {bonus}, stacking up to {effect_amplifier_cap} times, lasting {effect_duration} sec.
Blocking with shield has {trigger_chance} chance to increase your Evasion Chance by {bonus}, stacking up to {effect_amplifier_cap} times, lasting {effect_duration} sec.
spell.skill_tree_rpgs.warrior_tier_2_pas: Upon rolling, you have {trigger_chance} chance to reset the cooldown of Charge.
Upon rolling, you have {trigger_chance} chance to restore 10%% of your total health.
spell.skill_tree_rpgs.warrior_tier_2_spe: Shattering Throw ricochets to {ricochet} additional target.
spell.skill_tree_rpgs.warrior_tier_3_pas: Taking damage has {trigger_chance_1} chance to apply Enrage effect, increasing your Size and Attack Speed by {bonus} but also the damage you take, stacking up to {effect_amplifier_cap} times, lasting {stash_duration} sec.
Taking damage below {threshold} causes a shockwave, stunning enemies nearby for {effect_duration} sec.
spell.skill_tree_rpgs.warrior_tier_3_spe: Shout increases Attack Damage of allies by {bonus}, lasting {effect_duration} sec.
spell.skill_tree_rpgs.warrior_tier_4_spe: Next attack after using Charge, stuns the target for {effect_duration} sec.
spell.skill_tree_rpgs.weapon_arcane_blas: Increases the maximum number of Arcane Charges by {effect_amplifier_cap_add}.
Increases the duration of Arcane Charges by {effect_duration_add} sec.
spell.skill_tree_rpgs.weapon_bow_passive: Arrow hits have {trigger_chance} chance to slow the target for {effect_duration} sec.
Arrow hits have {trigger_chance} chance to apply Poison for {effect_duration} sec.
spell.skill_tree_rpgs.weapon_cleave_modi: Extends the reach of Cleave by +0.5 blocks.
Reduces the cooldown of Cleave by {cooldown_duration_deduct} sec.
spell.skill_tree_rpgs.weapon_crossbow_pa: Crossbow shots have {trigger_chance} chance to apply Weakness to the target for {effect_duration} sec.
Crossbow shots have {trigger_chance} chance to cause a small explosion on the target.
spell.skill_tree_rpgs.weapon_fan_of_kniv: Fan of Knives daggers ricochet to {ricochet} additional targets.
Fan of Knives launches {extra_launch} additional daggers.
spell.skill_tree_rpgs.weapon_fire_blast_: Increases the area of effect of Pyroblast by {bonus}.
Increases the knockback of Pyroblast by {knockback_multiply_base}.
spell.skill_tree_rpgs.weapon_fire_root.d: Pyroblast has {bonus} increased critical strike chance.
spell.skill_tree_rpgs.weapon_flurry_modi: Each strike of Flurry increases your Attack Damage by {bonus} for {effect_duration} sec, stacking up to {effect_amplifier_cap} times.
Frostbolt deals {bonus} increased critical strike damage.
spell.skill_tree_rpgs.weapon_frostbolt_m: Frostbolt slow effect lasts {effect_duration_add} sec longer.
spell.skill_tree_rpgs.weapon_ground_slam: Ground Slam has {impact_chance} chance to stun the target for {effect_duration} sec.
Casting Ground Slam has {trigger_chance_1} chance to guarantee a critical strike for the next melee attack.
spell.skill_tree_rpgs.weapon_holy_root.d: Reduces the cooldown of Holy Shock by {cooldown_duration_deduct} sec.
spell.skill_tree_rpgs.weapon_holy_shock_: Damaging with Holy Shock causes small explosion, hitting enemies within {impact_range} blocks radius.
spell.skill_tree_rpgs.weapon_impale_modi: Impale pins the target, applying Immobilize for {effect_duration} sec.
spell.skill_tree_rpgs.weapon_smash_modif: Smash hits have {trigger_chance} chance to reset its own cooldown.
Smash reduces the target's armor by {bonus} for {effect_duration} sec.
spell.skill_tree_rpgs.weapon_swift_strik: Reduces the cooldown of Swift Strikes by {cooldown_duration_deduct} sec.
spell.skill_tree_rpgs.weapon_swipe_modif: You are invulnerable when using Swipe.
Swipe hits have {trigger_chance} chance to reset the cooldown of Swipe.
spell.skill_tree_rpgs.weapon_whirlwind_m: Whirlwind has {impact_chance} chance to immobilize the target for {effect_duration} sec.
